---
title: ""
author: "Giorgio Arcara"
date: ""
#format: revealjs
format:
  beamer:
    theme: metropolis
    keep-tex: false
incremental: false
header-includes:
  \setbeamerfont{title}{size=\large}
  \usepackage{hyperref}
  \usepackage{tikz}
  \usetikzlibrary{positioning, arrows.meta}
  \setbeamertemplate{footline}[frame number]
---

<!-- the section below is shown only if rendering is beamer from latex. (and format:revealjs is commmented) -->

::: {.content-visible when-format="beamer"}
```{=latex}
% TITLE SLIDES
\title{{\fontsize{15pt}{16pt}\selectfont Applied Psychometrics}:\\ studying subclinical psychopathologies\\ \vspace{1.5em} \raggedright \emph{1.2 - Unobservable entities}}
\author{Giorgio Arcara,\\ University of Padua \\ IRCCS San Camillo, Venice}

\titlegraphic{

\vspace*{7cm}
\includegraphics[scale=0.15]{Figures/LogoSanCamilloIRCCS_Unipd_alpha.png}
\begin{center}
\vspace{-2.2em}
\includegraphics[scale=0.15]{Figures/CC_license_3_0.png}
\end{center}
}
\date{2026}
\maketitle
```
:::

## Who said this?
```{=latex}
\begin{center}
\emph{"Measure what is measurable, and make measurable what is not so"}
\end{center}
\vfill
\pause
\begin{columns}
    \begin{column}{0.5\textwidth}
        \begin{enumerate}
            \item Andrea Vesalio (1514-1564)
            \item Galileo Galilei (1564-1642)
            \item Cesare Musatti (1897-1989)
        \end{enumerate}
    \end{column}
    \begin{column}{0.5\textwidth}
    \pause
        \begin{figure}
            \includegraphics[width=0.5\linewidth]{Figures/Galileo.arp.300pix.jpg}
        \end{figure}
    \end{column}
\end{columns}
```

## Unobservable entities in Physics
```{=latex}
\begin{figure}
\includegraphics[height=4cm]{Figures/termometro_mercurio.png}
\end{figure}
```

## Unobservable entities in Psychology

```{=latex}
\begin{center}
\begin{tikzpicture}
    % First block (top)
    \node[draw, rectangle, text width=4cm, align=center] (construct) {\textbf{Construct} \\ (e.g. Anxiety, Memory)};
    
    % Second block (bottom, 5cm below)
    \node[draw, rectangle, minimum width=3cm, minimum height=1cm, below=5cm of construct] (measure) {Number};
    
    \onslide<1-2>{\draw[<->, >=stealth, gray, dashed, thick] (construct) -- (measure);}
    
\onslide<2>{\node[rectangle, minimum width=3cm, minimum height=1cm, below=2.25cm of construct, xshift=3cm] (Notpossible) {\textbf{Not possible!}};}

    
    \onslide<3->{
      
    \node[draw, rectangle, text width=4cm, align=center, below=2cm of construct] (behaviour) {\textbf{Behaviour}\\ (e.g., responses to test)};
    
    % Straight arrows (gray, dashed)
    \draw[-{Stealth}, gray, solid, thick] (construct) -- (behaviour);
    \draw[-{Stealth}, gray, solid, thick] (behaviour) -- (measure);
    
    % Curved arrow on the left from construct to measure
     \draw[<->, >=stealth, gray, dashed, thick] (measure) to[out=180, in=180] (construct);}
     
     \onslide<4->{
      
    \node[draw, rectangle, text width=4cm, align=center, right=0.5cm of construct] (others) {\textbf{Other variables}\\ {\small(e.g., Motivation,Mood, Fatigue, \textit{Other Constructs}})};        
    \draw[-{Stealth}, gray, solid, thick] (others) -- (behaviour);
     
     }
    \onslide<5>{\node[rectangle, minimum width=3cm, minimum height=1cm, below=2.25cm of construct, xshift=3cm] (Notpossible) {\includegraphics[height=2cm]{Figures/termometro_mercurio.png}};}

    
\end{tikzpicture}
\end{center}
```
